debug_info.goal:
case inr
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
inst✝⁶ : Fintype ι
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
E : ι → Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : (i : ι) → NormedAddCommGroup (E i)
inst✝⁴ : (i : ι) → NormedSpace ℝ (E i)
inst✝³ : (i : ι) → MeasurableSpace (E i)
inst✝² : ∀ (i : ι), CompleteSpace (E i)
inst✝¹ : ∀ (i : ι), BorelSpace (E i)
inst✝ : ∀ (i : ι), SecondCountableTopology (E i)
X : (i : ι) → Ω → E i
h : ∀ (i : ι), HasGaussianLaw (X i) P
hX : iIndepFun X P
this : IsProbabilityMeasure P
hι : Nonempty ι
⊢ ∃ m f,
    f.toBilinForm.IsPosSemidef ∧
      ∀ (L : StrongDual ℝ ((x : ι) → E x)),
        charFunDual (Measure.map (fun ω x => X x ω) P) L = exp (↑(L m) * I - ↑((f L) L) / 2)

failed_attempts:
choose m f hf_pos hf_char using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.mp (h i).isGaussian_map
    refine ⟨m, ∑ i, (f i).comp (single i).dualMap, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [map_sum]
      apply BilinForm.isPosSemidef_sum
      intro i _
      rw [QuadraticForm.toBilinForm_comp]
      exact (hf_pos i).comp _
    · intro L
      rw [charFunDual_map_eq_integral (by fun_prop) aestronglyMeasurable_id]
      have : ∀ ω, L (X · ω) = ∑ i, (single i).dualMap L (X i ω) := by
        intro ω
        rw [← map_sum]
        congr with j
        simp only [Finset.sum_apply, Pi.single_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ, if_true]
      simp_rw [this, Finset.mul_sum, Complex.exp_sum]
      rw [iIndepFun.integral_prod]
      · simp_rw [← charFunDual_map_eq_integral (by fun_prop) aestronglyMeasurable_id, hf_char]
        rw [← Complex.exp_sum, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
        congrm exp (?_ - ?_)
        · rw [map_sum]
          congr with i
          rw [dualMap_apply, comp_apply]
        · simp only [QuadraticForm.sum_apply, Finset.sum_div, QuadraticForm.comp_apply]
      · exact hX.comp (fun i x ↦ exp (I * (single i).dualMap L x)) (by fun_prop)
      · fun_prop
      · exact fun i ↦ integrable_of_bounded (by fun_prop) (by simp)

choose μ Q hQ_pos h_char using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.mp (h i).isGaussian_map
    refine ⟨fun i ↦ μ i, ∑ i, (Q i).comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i).dualMap, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [QuadraticForm.isPosSemidef_iff_nonneg]
      intro x
      simp only [QuadraticForm.sum_apply, QuadraticForm.comp_apply]
      exact Finset.sum_nonneg fun i _ ↦ (hQ_pos i).nonneg _
    · intro L
      let l := fun i ↦ (ContinuousLinearMap.single i).dualMap L
      have h_indep : iIndepFun (fun i ω ↦ exp (I * l i (X i ω))) P :=

      rw [charFunDual_eq, integral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
      simp only [Complex.ofReal_sum, Complex.ofReal_mul]
      trans ∫ ω, ∏ i, exp (I * l i (X i ω)) ∂P

        rw [← exp_sum, ← Finset.sum_mul]

        rw [Finset.sum_eq_single j] <;> simp
      rw [h_indep.integral_prod_of_integrable, ← exp_sum]
      · congr with i
        specialize h_char i (l i)
        rw [charFunDual_eq, integral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)] at h_char
        rw [h_char]
        simp only [Complex.ofReal_mul, Complex.ofReal_div, Complex.ofReal_sub]
        ring
      · exact fun i ↦ ((h i).aestronglyMeasurable.apply_continuous (l i).continuous).exp_mul_I
      · intro i
        refine integrable_of_norm_bound 1 (integrable_const 1) (fun ω ↦ ?_)
        simp only [Function.comp_apply, norm_eq_abs, abs_exp, mul_re, I_re, mul_zero, I_im,

    let π i := (single i : E i →L[ℝ] (j : ι) → E j).dualMap

        ← Complex.exp_sum, ← Finset.prod_exp,
        (hX.comp (fun i y ↦ exp (I * Li i y)) (by fun_prop)).integral_prod h_int]

      · rw [← mul_sum, ← L.map_sum]
        congr; ext; simp [Li, π, single, Function.update]
      · simp [Li, π, sum_apply, comp_apply, flip_apply]
        rw [sum_div]

    exact IsGaussian.pi (fun i ↦ (h i).isGaussian_map)

choose m f hmf using fun i ↦ (h i).isGaussian_map
    let F := ∑ i, (f i).compl₁₂ (Pi.single i).dualMap (Pi.single i).dualMap
    refine ⟨fun i ↦ m i, F, ?_⟩
    constructor
    · intro L
      simp only [F, sum_apply, compl₁₂_apply, dualMap_apply]
      exact Finset.sum_nonneg fun i _ ↦ (hmf i).1 _
    · intro L
      simp only [F, sum_apply, compl₁₂_apply, dualMap_apply,
        Complex.ofReal_sum, Complex.ofReal_div, Complex.ofReal_sub, Complex.ofReal_mul]
      rw [← Finset.sum_div, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib, exp_sum]
      rw [charFunDual, integral_map]
      · simp_rw [← Finset.sum_mul, ← exp_sum]
        rw [← iIndepFun.integral_finset_prod Finset.univ]
        · refine Finset.prod_congr rfl fun i _ ↦ ?_
          rw [charFunDual, integral_map] at hmf
          · specialize hmf i
            rw [(hmf).2 ((Pi.single i).dualMap L)]
            simp
          · exact (h i).aemeasurable
          · exact (h i).aestronglyMeasurable
        · refine hX.comp (fun i x ↦ cexp (I * L (Pi.single i x))) ?_
          intro i
          exact (continuous_const.mul (L.comp (Pi.single i)).continuous).cexp.measurable
        · intro i _
          exact (integrable_of_norm_bounded _ (integrable_const _) (by simp)).comp_aemeasurable (h i).aemeasurable
        · intro i _
          apply Measurable.comp_aemeasurable (measurable_id.const_mul _).cexp
          apply ((L.comp (Pi.single i)).continuous.measurable.comp_aemeasurable (h i).aemeasurable)
        · congr
          ext ω
          rw [← ContinuousLinearMap.map_sum]
          congr
          exact (Finset.univ_sum_single _).symm
      · exact aemeasurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable)
      · exact aestronglyMeasurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun i ↦ (h i).aestronglyMeasurable)

choose m B hB_pos h_char using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.1 ((h i).isGaussian_map)
    let J (i : ι) : StrongDual ℝ ((j : ι) → E j) →ₗ[ℝ] StrongDual ℝ (E i) :=
      { toFun := fun L ↦ L.comp (single i)

    refine ⟨m, ∑ i, (B i).comp (J i) (J i), ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [BilinForm.isPosSemidef_sum]
      exact fun i _ ↦ (hB_pos i).comp (J i)
    · intro L

        ← iIndepFun.integral_prod (hX.comp (fun i x ↦ exp (I * (J i L) x)) (by fun_prop))
          (fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable.comp_continuous (by fun_prop) |>.integrable_of_bound 1
            (eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ abs_exp_ofReal_le_one _))]
      simp_rw [← charFunDual_map_apply (h i).aemeasurable, h_char]
      rw [← Complex.exp_sum]
      congr 1
      simp only [ofReal_sum, ofReal_sub, ofReal_div, ofReal_ofNat, sub_div]
      rw [← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
      congr with i
      · simp only [ofReal_mul, Finset.sum_mul]
        congr 1
        rw [← map_sum]
        congr; ext j; simp [Finset.sum_apply, Pi.single_apply]
      · simp [J, BilinForm.comp_apply]

choose μ Σ hΣ h_char using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.1 (h i).isGaussian_map
    let π : (i : ι) → StrongDual ℝ ((j : ι) → E j) →L[ℝ] StrongDual ℝ (E i) :=

        · exact fun i ↦ AEStronglyMeasurable.exp <| AEStronglyMeasurable.const_mul
            (Continuous.aestronglyMeasurable (L.continuous.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i).continuous) (h i).aemeasurable) I
        · exact fun i ↦ Integrable.of_bound (bound := 1) (by fun_prop) (eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ by simp)

have hg := fun i ↦ (isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual (E := E i)).mp (h i).isGaussian_map
    choose μ B hB_pos hB using hg
    let m : (i : ι) → E i := fun i ↦ μ i
    let Ψ (i : ι) := (ContinuousLinearMap.single i).dualMap
    let f : StrongDual ((x : ι) → E x) →L[ℝ] StrongDual ((x : ι) → E x) →L[ℝ] ℝ :=
      ∑ i, (B i).compl₁₂ (Ψ i) (Ψ i)
    refine ⟨m, f, ?_, fun L ↦ ?_⟩
    · intro L
      simp only [f, ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.compl₁₂_apply,
        ContinuousLinearMap.toBilinForm_apply]
      exact Finset.sum_nonneg fun i _ ↦ hB_pos i (Ψ i L)
    · have h_meas : AEMeasurable (fun ω x ↦ X x ω) P :=
        aemeasurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable)
      rw [charFunDual, integral_map h_meas (by fun_prop)]
      simp only [Function.comp_def, id_eq]
      have h_decomp : ∀ ω, L (fun x ↦ X x ω) = ∑ i, (Ψ i L) (X i ω) := by
        intro ω
        rw [← ContinuousLinearMap.map_sum]
        congr 1
        ext j
        simp [Ψ, ContinuousLinearMap.dualMap_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.single_apply]
      simp_rw [h_decomp, mul_sum, exp_sum]
      rw [iIndepFun.integral_prod]
      · simp_rw [charFunDual, integral_map (h _).aemeasurable (by fun_prop)] at hB
        simp_rw [hB]
        rw [← exp_sum, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
        congr 1
        simp only [f, ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.compl₁₂_apply, sub_left_inj]
        rw [← mul_sum]
        congr 1
        rw [← ContinuousLinearMap.map_sum]
        congr 1
        ext j
        simp [Ψ, ContinuousLinearMap.dualMap_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.single_apply]
      · exact hX.comp (fun i x ↦ exp (I * (Ψ i L) x)) (fun i ↦ Continuous.measurable (by fun_prop))
      · exact fun i ↦ ((h i).aemeasurable.const_mul _).exp.integrable_of_bounded (by simp)

choose m f hmf using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.1 (h i).isGaussian
    refine ⟨m, ∑ i, (f i).comp (single i).dualMap.toLinearMap, ?_, ?_⟩

      exact Finset.sum_nonneg fun i _ ↦ (hmf i).1 _
    · intro L
      simp only [QuadraticForm.sum_apply, QuadraticForm.comp_apply, LinearMap.coe_comp,
        ContinuousLinearMap.coe_toLinearMap, Function.comp_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.dualMap_apply,
        charFunDual_eq_integral_exp]
      rw [integral_map (aemeasurable_pi_iff.2 fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable)]
      · simp_rw [← ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, pi_eq_sum_univ (X · ·), map_sum, map_mul, exp_sum,
          Finset.prod_mul_distrib]
        rw [iIndepFun.integral_prod_complex hX]
        · simp_rw [← integral_map (h _).aemeasurable.measurable, ← charFunDual_eq_integral_exp,
            (hmf _).2]
          rw [← exp_sum, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
          congr 2
          simp only [sum_div, ← mul_sum]
          congr 2
          rw [← L.map_sum]
          congr
          ext j
          simp [pi_eq_sum_univ m]
        · exact fun i ↦ (continuous_subtype_val.comp (continuous_exp.comp (continuous_const.mul
            (L.comp (single i)).continuous))).measurable
      · fun_prop

choose m f hmf using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.1 (h i).isGaussian_map
    refine ⟨m, ∑ i, (single i).comp ((f i).comp (single i).dualMap), ?_, fun L ↦ ?_⟩
    · rw [toBilinForm_sum]
      exact isPosSemidef_sum fun i _ L ↦ (hmf i).1 (L.comp (single i))
    · rw [iIndepFun_iff_map_eq_pi_map hX, Measure.charFunDual_pi]
      · simp_rw [hmf, ← Complex.exp_sum, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
        congrm exp (?_ * I - ?_ / 2)
        · simp only [map_sum, comp_apply, single_apply, ← Pi.single_sum_apply (fun i ↦ m i)]
        · simp only [sum_apply, comp_apply, dualMap_apply]
      · exact fun i ↦ (h i).isProbabilityMeasure

choose m f hf_pos hf_eq using fun i ↦ (h i).isGaussian
    let S (i : ι) := (ContinuousLinearMap.single i).dualMap
    refine ⟨fun i ↦ m i, ∑ i, ((f i).comp (S i)).flip.comp (S i) |>.flip, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [ContinuousLinearMap.toBilinForm_sum]
      apply IsPosSemidef.sum
      intro i _
      simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.toBilinForm_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.flip_apply,
        ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply]
      exact fun L ↦ hf_pos i (S i L)
    · intro L
      rw [charFunDual_def, integral_map]
      · simp_rw [← Finset.univ_sum_single (X ·), ContinuousLinearMap.map_sum,
          ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, S, ContinuousLinearMap.dualMap_apply, exp_sum]
        rw [iIndepFun.integral_prod]
        · simp_rw [← charFunDual_def, hf_eq (S i L)]
          rw [← exp_sum, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
          congr 2
          · rw [← mul_sum]
            congr
            simp only [S, ContinuousLinearMap.dualMap_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.single_apply]
            rw [← ContinuousLinearMap.map_sum, Finset.univ_sum_single]
          · simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.flip_apply,
              ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, S]
            rw [← sub_div, ← mul_sum]
        · exact hX.comp _ (fun i ↦ ((S i L).continuous.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i).continuous))
        · exact fun i ↦ Integrable.of_bound (integrable_const 1)
            (Eventually.of_forall fun ω ↦ by simp [Complex.norm_exp_ofReal_mul_I]) (by fun_prop)
      · exact aestronglyMeasurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable)

choose m f hmf using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.mp (h i).isGaussian_map
    have : IsProbabilityMeasure P := hX.isProbabilityMeasure
    let P := fun i ↦ (ContinuousLinearMap.single i).dualMap
    let F := ∑ i, ((ContinuousLinearMap.compL ℝ _ _ _).flip (P i)).comp ((f i).comp (P i))
    refine ⟨fun i ↦ m i, F, ?_, fun L ↦ ?_⟩
    · rw [isPosSemidef_def]
      intro L
      simp only [F, P, ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_comp', Function.comp_apply,
        ContinuousLinearMap.flip_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.compL_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.toBilinForm_apply]
      apply Finset.sum_nonneg (fun i _ ↦ (hmf i).1 _)
    · rw [charFunDual]
      rw [integral_map (MeasureTheory.aemeasurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable)) aestronglyMeasurable_id]
      have L_eq : ∀ ω, L (fun i ↦ X i ω) = ∑ i, (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)) (X i ω) := by
        intro ω
        conv_lhs => rw [← Finset.univ_sum_single (fun i ↦ X i ω)]
        rw [map_sum]
        rfl
      simp_rw [L_eq, Complex.exp_sum_finset, ← map_mul]
      rw [hX.integral_prod]
      · simp_rw [hmf]
        rw [← Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Complex.exp_sum_finset]
        congr 1
        rw [← mul_sum, ← mul_sum]
        congr 1
        · rw [← map_sum]
          congr; ext; rw [Finset.univ_sum_single]
        · simp only [F, P, ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_comp', Function.comp_apply,
            ContinuousLinearMap.flip_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.compL_apply]
          rfl
      · exact fun i ↦ (Continuous.integrable_of_isCompact (IsCompact.of_isClosed_subset isCompact_univ isClosed_univ (by simp)) (by fun_prop)).comp_aemeasurable (h i).aemeasurable
      · exact fun i ↦ (by fun_prop)

choose μ B hB using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.1 (h i).isGaussian_map
    refine ⟨μ, ∑ i, (B i).compl₁₂ (single i).dualMap (single i).dualMap, ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro L
      simp only [sum_apply, compl₁₂_apply, dualMap_apply]
      exact sum_nonneg fun i _ ↦ (hB i).1 _
    · intro L
      simp only [sum_apply, compl₁₂_apply, dualMap_apply]
      rw [charFunDual, integral_map]
      · rw [← exp_sum, ← sum_div, ← sum_sub_distrib]
        have : L μ = ∑ i, L (single i (μ i)) := by
          rw [← map_sum, Finset.sum_hom (Pi.single · (μ ·))]; simp
        rw [this, ← mul_sum, ← sum_sub_distrib]
        have : ∀ ω, L (X ω) = ∑ i, (L.comp (single i)) (X i ω) := fun ω ↦ by
          rw [← map_sum, Finset.sum_hom (Pi.single · (X · ω))]; simp
        simp_rw [this, mul_sum, Complex.exp_sum]
        rw [iIndepFun.integral_prod_mul (fun i ↦ (h i).aestronglyMeasurable) hX]
        · simp_rw [charFunDual_eq_integral_exp, integral_map (h _).aestronglyMeasurable aestronglyMeasurable_id]
          congr with i
          rw [(hB i).2]
        · exact fun i ↦ ((L.comp (single i)).continuous.comp_aestronglyMeasurable (h i).aestronglyMeasurable).measurable
        · exact fun i ↦ Integrable.of_bound (by fun_prop) (eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ by simp [Complex.abs_exp_eq_one])
      · exact .pi fun i ↦ (h i).aestronglyMeasurable
      · exact aestronglyMeasurable_id

choose m f hf_pos hf_eq using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.1 ((h i).isGaussian)
    refine ⟨m, ∑ i, (ContinuousLinearMap.single i).dualMap.dualMap.comp ((f i).comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i).dualMap), ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [ContinuousLinearMap.isPosSemidef_def]
      intro L
      simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply,
        ContinuousLinearMap.dualMap_apply]
      apply Finset.sum_nonneg (fun i _ ↦ hf_pos i _)
    · intro L
      rw [hX.map_pi_eq_pi, charFunDual]
      simp_rw [ContinuousLinearMap.pi_apply_eq_sum_univ (fun i ↦ (ContinuousLinearMap.single i).dualMap L),
        map_sum, complex_ofReal_sum, mul_sum, Complex.exp_sum, ← complex_ofReal_mul]
      rw [MeasureTheory.integral_finset_prod]
      · simp_rw [← charFunDual, hf_eq]
        simp_rw [map_sum, map_sub, map_div₀, complex_ofReal_sum, complex_ofReal_sub, complex_ofReal_div,
          Finset.sum_sub_distrib, ← Finset.sum_div, Finset.sum_mul]
        congr 1
        · congr 1
          simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.pi_apply_eq_sum_univ (fun i ↦ (ContinuousLinearMap.single i).dualMap L)]
          simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.dualMap_apply]
          rw [L.map_sum]
          congr with i
          rfl
        · simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.dualMap_apply]
          rfl
      · intro i _
        apply MeasureTheory.integrable_of_norm_le_const _ (C := 1)
        · simp
        · fun_prop

rw [hX.measure_map_pi]
    exact isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.1 (IsGaussian.pi fun i ↦ (h i).isGaussian_map)

choose m f hf using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.mp (h i).isGaussian
    refine ⟨fun i ↦ m i, ∑ i, (f i).comp (single i).dualMap, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [map_sum]
      refine fun x ↦ Finset.sum_nonneg fun i _ ↦ ?_
      rw [QuadraticForm.toBilinForm_comp, BilinForm.comp_apply]
      exact (hf i).1 _
    · intro L
      rw [charFunDual, integral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
      have : ∀ ω, L (fun i ↦ X i ω) = ∑ i, (single i).dualMap L (X i ω) := fun ω ↦ by
        rw [← map_sum, Finset.univ_sum_single]; rfl
      simp_rw [this, Finset.sum_mul, exp_sum]
      rw [iIndepFun.integral_prod hX]
      · simp_rw [← charFunDual, (hf _).2]
        rw [← exp_sum]
        congr 1
        simp only [QuadraticForm.sum_apply, QuadraticForm.comp_apply, Finset.sum_sub_distrib,
          Finset.sum_div, Finset.sum_mul]
        congr 1
        · rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
          congr with i
          simp only [dualMap_apply, coe_comp', Function.comp_apply]
        · congr with i
          rfl
      · exact fun i ↦ (AEStronglyMeasurable.continuous (map_continuous _) (h i).aemeasurable).aestronglyMeasurable
      · exact fun i ↦ (integrable_const 1).mono' (by fun_prop) (eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ by simp) |>.mem_L1

choose m B hB_pos hB_char using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.1 (h i).isGaussian_map
    refine ⟨fun i ↦ m i, ∑ i, (B i).comp (single i).dualMap, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [ContinuousQuadraticForm.toBilinForm_sum]
      intro x
      simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousQuadraticForm.toBilinForm_apply,
        ContinuousQuadraticForm.comp_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.dualMap_apply]
      apply Finset.sum_nonneg
      intro i _
      exact (hB_pos i) _
    · intro L
      rw [charFunDual_map_pi_eq_prod hX (fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable)]
      simp only [hB_char, ContinuousQuadraticForm.comp_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.dualMap_apply,
        Complex.ofReal_sum, Complex.ofReal_div, ← Finset.sum_div, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib,
        ← exp_sum]
      congr 1
      rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
      congr 1
      rw [← L.map_sum]
      congr
      ext j
      simp only [Finset.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.single_apply]
      rw [Finset.sum_eq_single j]
      · simp
      · intro k _ hkj; simp [hkj]

choose m B hB using fun i ↦ (h i).isGaussian_map
    let Φ (i : ι) := ContinuousLinearMap.lcomp ℝ ℝ (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)
    let f := ∑ i, (B i).compl₁₂ (Φ i) (Φ i)
    refine ⟨m, f, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [ContinuousLinearMap.isPosSemidef_iff_isPosDef]
      intro L
      simp only [f, ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.compl₁₂_apply,
        ContinuousLinearMap.lcomp_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_sum, Pi.sum_apply]
      exact Finset.sum_nonneg fun i _ ↦ (hB i).1.pos_semidef _
    · intro L
      rw [charFunDual, integral_map]
      · have h_eq : ∀ ω, L (fun i ↦ X i ω) = ∑ i, (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)) (X i ω) := by
          intro ω; rw [← map_sum, Finset.sum_apply]; congr; ext; simp [ContinuousLinearMap.single_apply, Finset.sum_apply]
        simp_rw [h_eq, Finset.sum_mul, Complex.exp_sum]
        rw [iIndepFun.integral_finset_prod]
        · simp_rw [← charFunDual, (hB _).2]
          rw [← exp_sum]
          congr 1
          simp only [f, ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.compl₁₂_apply,
            ContinuousLinearMap.lcomp_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_sum, Pi.sum_apply,
            Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_div]
          congrm ?_ - ?_
          · rw [← Finset.sum_mul, ← map_sum, Finset.sum_apply]
            congr 2; ext; simp [ContinuousLinearMap.single_apply, Finset.sum_apply]
          · rfl
        · exact hX.comp (fun i x ↦ cexp (I * (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)) x)) (fun i ↦ by fun_prop)
        · exact fun i _ ↦ by fun_prop
        · exact fun i _ ↦ integrable_of_norm_eq_one (by fun_prop) (by simp)
      · exact AEMeasurable.pi_aemeasurable fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable

choose μ B hpos hchar using fun i ↦ (h i).isGaussian_map
    let Ψ := fun i ↦ ContinuousLinearMap.lcomp ℝ ℝ (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)
    refine ⟨μ, ∑ i, (B i).bilinearComp (Ψ i) (Ψ i), ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [ContinuousLinearMap.toBilinForm_sum]
      refine IsPosSemidef.sum _ (fun i _ ↦ ?_)
      change IsPosSemidef ((B i).toBilinForm.comp (Ψ i).toLinearMap (Ψ i).toLinearMap)
      exact (hpos i).comp (Ψ i).toLinearMap
    · intro L
      rw [charFunDual, integral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
      simp_rw [ContinuousLinearMap.pi_apply_eq_sum_univ L (X ·), Complex.ofReal_sum,
        Finset.mul_sum, Complex.exp_sum]
      rw [iIndepFun.integral_prod]
      · simp_rw [← charFunDual, hchar]
        rw [← exp_sum, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
        congr 1
        simp_rw [ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.bilinearComp_apply,
          Ψ, ContinuousLinearMap.lcomp_apply, Complex.ofReal_sum, map_sum,
          ← Finset.sum_div, mul_sum]
        congr 1
        · rw [← L.map_sum]
          congr; ext j; simp
      · exact hX.comp (fun i x ↦ cexp (↑((Ψ i L) x) * I)) (by fun_prop)
      · exact fun i ↦ MeasureTheory.Integrable.of_bounded (by fun_prop)
          (Eventually.of_forall fun _ ↦ by simp [Complex.abs_exp])

choose m B hB_pos hB_char using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.mp (h i).isGaussian_map
    let L_ (i : ι) : StrongDual ℝ ((j : ι) → E j) →L[ℝ] StrongDual ℝ (E i) :=
      (compL ℝ (E i) ((j : ι) → E j) ℝ).flip (single i)
    refine ⟨m, ∑ i, (B i).compBilin (L_ i) (L_ i), ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro L
      simp only [sum_apply, compBilin_apply, comp_apply]
      exact Finset.sum_nonneg fun i _ ↦ hB_pos i _
    · intro L
      rw [charFunDual_map_apply, ← Finset.sum_apply (L_ · L) (X · ·), map_sum]
      simp_rw [← L_, ← Finset.exp_sum]
      rw [iIndepFun.integral_comp_prod hX]
      · simp_rw [← charFunDual_map_apply, hB_char, ← exp_sum, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
        congrm exp ?_
        simp only [Complex.ofReal_sum, Complex.ofReal_sub, Complex.ofReal_div, ← Finset.sum_mul,
          map_sum, compBilin_apply, comp_apply, L_]
        rw [ContinuousLinearMap.pi_apply_eq_sum_univ (L : (Π j, E j) →L[ℝ] ℝ) m]
        simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.flip_apply, coe_compL', comp_apply]
      · exact fun i ↦ ((L_ i L).continuous.measurable.comp_aemeasurable (h i).aemeasurable).ofReal.mul_const I |>.cexp.aestronglyMeasurable
      · exact fun i ↦ ((L_ i L).continuous.measurable.comp_aemeasurable (h i).aemeasurable).ofReal.mul_const I |>.cexp.integrable_of_bounded

choose m B hm hB using fun i ↦ (isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual _).1 (h i)
    refine ⟨m, ∑ i, (single i).dualMap.dualMap ∘L B i ∘L (single i).dualMap, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [isPosSemidef_iff_eq_zero]
      intro x
      simp only [LinearMap.coe_toBilinForm, coe_sum, coe_comp, LinearMap.sum_apply,
        Finset.sum_apply, Function.comp_apply]
      refine sum_nonneg fun i _ ↦ ?_
      rw [dualMap_dualMap_apply]
      exact hm i _
    · intro L
      rw [charFunDual_apply, integral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
      simp_rw [Pi.pi_eq_sum_univ (fun x ↦ X x _), map_sum, L.map_sum, ← Finset.sum_mul, exp_sum]
      rw [iIndepFun.integral_prod]
      · simp_rw [charFunDual_apply, integral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), hB]
        rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← exp_sum]
        congrm exp (?_ * I - ?_ / 2)
        · rw [← L.map_sum, Complex.ofReal_inj]
          congrm L ?_
          exact (Pi.pi_eq_sum_univ m).symm
        · simp only [coe_sum, coe_comp, LinearMap.sum_apply, Finset.sum_apply,
            Function.comp_apply, dualMap_dualMap_apply]
          rfl
      · apply hX.comp
        exact fun i ↦ Continuous.measurable (by fun_prop)
      · exact fun _ ↦ integrable_const _

choose m f hf_pos hf_char using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.mp (h i).isGaussian_map
    refine ⟨m, ∑ i, (f i).bilinearComp (single i).dualMap (single i).dualMap, ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro L
      simp only [sum_apply, bilinearComp_apply]
      exact Finset.sum_nonneg fun i _ ↦ hf_pos i _
    · intro L
      simp only [sum_apply, bilinearComp_apply, charFunDual]
      rw [integral_map (aemeasurable_pi_iff.mpr fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable) aestronglyMeasurable_id]
      simp_rw [← Finset.sum_div, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib, ← exp_sum, ← Finset.sum_mul, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
      let g (i : ι) (x : E i) : ℂ := cexp (I * (single i).dualMap L x)
      convert iIndepFun.integral_prod (hX.comp g (fun i ↦ by fun_prop)) (fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable.aestronglyMeasurable.map_of_continuous (by fun_prop)) (fun i ↦ by fun_prop)
      · ext ω
        simp only [g]
        rw [← exp_sum, ← Finset.sum_mul]
        congr 2
        rw [← map_sum, Finset.univ_sum_single]
        rfl
      · simp only [g, ← hf_char, charFunDual]
        congr with i
        rw [integral_map (h i).aemeasurable aestronglyMeasurable_id]
        rfl

have hg : ∀ i, ∃ m f, f.toBilinForm.IsPosSemidef ∧ ∀ L, charFunDual (Measure.map (X i) P) L = exp (L m * I - f L L / 2) := by
      intro i
      rw [← isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual]
      exact (h i).isGaussian_map
    choose m B hB h_char using hg
    let m_pi := fun i ↦ m i
    let B_pi := ContinuousLinearMap.pi (fun i ↦ (B i).comp ((ContinuousLinearMap.single i).compRight))
    refine ⟨m_pi, B_pi, ?_, ?_⟩
    · constructor
      intro L
      simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.toBilinForm_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_pi]
      have h_decomp : ∀ x : (i : ι) → E i, x = ∑ i, Pi.single i (x i) :=
        fun x ↦ (Finset.univ_sum_single x).symm
      have hL_eq : ∀ x, L x = ∑ i, L (Pi.single i (x i)) := by
        intro x; rw [h_decomp x, map_sum]
      rw [hL_eq (B_pi L)]
      simp only [B_pi, ContinuousLinearMap.pi_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply,
        ContinuousLinearMap.compRight_apply]
      rw [← Finset.sum_map]
      apply Finset.sum_nonneg (fun i _ ↦ ?_)
      convert (hB i).1 (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i))
    · intro L
      have hX_meas : AEMeasurable (fun ω i ↦ X i ω) P := aemeasurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable)
      rw [charFunDual_def, integral_map hX_meas]
      have hL : ∀ ω, L (fun i ↦ X i ω) = ∑ i, (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)) (X i ω) := by
        intro ω
        rw [← map_sum, Finset.univ_sum_single]
      simp_rw [hL, mul_sum, Complex.exp_sum]
      rw [iIndepFun.integral_prod hX (fun i x ↦ exp (I * (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)) x))]
      · simp_rw [← charFunDual_def, h_char, map_sum]
        rw [← Complex.exp_sum]
        congr 1
        simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.toBilinForm_apply, B_pi,
          ContinuousLinearMap.pi_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply,
          ContinuousLinearMap.compRight_apply]
        rw [← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
        congr with i
        rw [sub_right_inj, mul_div_assoc, mul_div_assoc]
      · exact fun i ↦ Continuous.aestronglyMeasurable (by fun_prop)
      · exact fun i ↦ Continuous.integrable_of_isCompact (by fun_prop) CompactSpace.isCompact_univ Measure.integrable_of_isProbabilityMeasure

choose m f hf_pos hf using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.1 (h i).isGaussian_map
    refine ⟨m, ∑ i, (single i).dualMap.dualMap.comp ((f i).comp (single i).dualMap), ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [isPosSemidef_def]
      intro L
      simp only [sum_apply, comp_apply, dualMap_apply, single_apply]
      exact Finset.sum_nonneg fun i _ ↦ hf_pos i _
    · intro L
      simp only [charFunDual_map_apply]
      have h_sum : ∀ ω, L (fun i ↦ X i ω) = ∑ i, (single i).dualMap L (X i ω) := fun ω ↦ by
        rw [← map_sum, Fintype.sum_pi_single']
      simp_rw [h_sum, ofReal_sum, mul_sum, Complex.exp_sum]
      rw [hX.integral_prod]
      · simp_rw [← charFunDual_map_apply, hf]
        rw [← Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.prod_eq_exp_sum]
        congrm exp (?_ * I - ?_ / 2)
        · rw [map_sum, ofReal_sum]
          exact Finset.sum_cong rfl fun i _ ↦ by rw [dualMap_apply, single_apply]
        · simp only [sum_apply, comp_apply, dualMap_apply]
      · exact fun i ↦ (HasGaussianLaw.aemeasurable (h i)).comp_continuous
          (exp_continuous.comp (continuous_mul_left _))
      · exact fun i ↦ MeasureTheory.Integrable.of_bound (integrable_const 1)
          (Filter.Eventually.of_forall fun _ ↦ by simp)

choose m f hf using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.mp (h i).isGaussian_map
    refine ⟨fun i ↦ m i, ∑ i, (f i).compl₁₂ (single i).dualMap (single i).dualMap, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [toBilinForm_sum]
      apply BilinForm.isPosSemidef_sum
      intro i _
      convert (hf i).1.comp (single i).dualMap.toLinearMap using 1
      ext x y
      simp [compl₁₂, BilinForm.comp]
    · intro L
      simp only [sum_apply, compl₁₂_apply, dualMap_apply]
      rw [charFunDual_eq_integral_exp]
      have : ∀ ω, L (fun x ↦ X x ω) = ∑ i, (L.comp (single i)) (X i ω) := fun ω ↦ by
        rw [← map_sum, ← Finset.sum_apply]
        congr; ext j; simp [single_apply, Finset.sum_apply, Pi.single_apply]
      simp_rw [this, Complex.ofReal_sum, Finset.sum_mul, Complex.exp_sum]
      rw [iIndepFun.integral_prod]
      · simp_rw [← charFunDual_eq_integral_exp, (hf _).2]
        rw [← Finset.exp_sum]
        congr 1
        simp only [Complex.ofReal_sum, Complex.ofReal_div, mul_div_assoc, ← Finset.sum_div,
          ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
        ring
      · exact hX.comp (fun i ↦ (L.comp (single i))) _
      · exact fun i ↦ Measure.integrable_of_norm_le_const (by fun_prop) (by simp) 1

choose μ B hB using fun i ↦ (h i).isGaussian_map
    let π (i : ι) : StrongDual ℝ ((j : ι) → E j) →L[ℝ] StrongDual ℝ (E i) :=
      ContinuousLinearMap.compL ℝ (E i) ((j : ι) → E j) ℝ (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)
    refine ⟨fun i ↦ μ i, ∑ i, (B i).comp (π i), ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [ContinuousQuadraticForm.toBilinForm_sum]
      apply LinearMap.IsPosSemidef.sum
      intro i _
      rw [ContinuousQuadraticForm.toBilinForm_comp]
      exact (hB i).1.comp _
    · intro L
      rw [charFunDual_def, integral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
      have : ∀ ω, L (fun i ↦ X i ω) = ∑ i, (π i L) (X i ω) := by
        intro ω
        simp only [π, ContinuousLinearMap.compL_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply]
        rw [← map_sum, Finset.sum_apply, Pi.sum_single]
      simp_rw [this, Complex.ofReal_sum, mul_sum, exp_sum]
      rw [iIndepFun.integral_finset_prod (iIndepFun.comp hX _ (fun i ↦ continuous_exp.measurable.comp (measurable_const_mul _ (π i L).measurable)))]
      · simp_rw [← charFunDual_def, (hB _).2]
        rw [← exp_sum, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib, ← Finset.sum_div]
        simp only [ContinuousQuadraticForm.sum_apply, ContinuousQuadraticForm.comp_apply,
          Complex.ofReal_sum, Complex.ofReal_div]
        congr 2
        simp only [π, ContinuousLinearMap.compL_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply]
        congr
      · exact fun i ↦ (continuous_exp.measurable.comp (measurable_const_mul _ (π i L).measurable)).aemeasurable
      · intro i
        apply (continuous_exp.measurable.comp (measurable_const_mul _ (π i L).measurable)).aestronglyMeasurable.integrable_of_norm_le (g := 1)
        · exact integrable_const 1
        · intro ω; simp
